title: SecretValue has no Debug/Display/Clone — intentional and correct
description: SecretValue deliberately does not derive Debug, Display, Clone, Serialize, or Deserialize. A future contributor may suggest adding these for convenience or test ergonomics. Do not add them. Debug/Display would make secret bytes appear in panic output, tracing spans, and structured logs. Clone would allow callers to create long-lived copies outside Zeroizing scope. Serialize would allow accidental serialization to JSON/logs. The awkwardness of assert_eq!(v.as_bytes(), b"expected") in tests is the correct tradeoff: it prevents the test helper from accidentally printing secret content.
